activeTicTacToeState.summary: The tic-tac-toe round ended in a draw.

eventOrder.responsePreview: Hey there! I'm so excited to meet you!
It sounds like you might be thinking about a game! Are you wanting to play tic-tac-toe with me?
You're right! We did start tic-tac-toe and it's your turn to go first. You're X and I'm O - just pick any square from 1
